'''鈭歝h-ch-ch-p''' ('''kachachchepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cellar|cellar]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-ch-ch-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cellar|cellar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-ch-ch-p
|-
! Lemma
| kachachchepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichachepoko|thichachepoko]] || [[word:jichachepoko|jichachepoko]] || [[word:shichachepoko|shichachepoko]] || [[word:kichachepoko|kichachepoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochachepoko|thothochachepoko]] || [[word:jojochachepoko|jojochachepoko]] || [[word:shoshochachepoko|shoshochachepoko]] || [[word:kokochachepoko|kokochachepoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochachepoko|thochachepoko]] || [[word:jochachepoko|jochachepoko]] || [[word:shochachepoko|shochachepoko]] || [[word:kochachepoko|kochachepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙chachepoko|th忙chachepoko]] || [[word:j忙chachepoko|j忙chachepoko]] || [[word:sh忙chachepoko|sh忙chachepoko]] || [[word:k忙chachepoko|k忙chachepoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachachepoko|thachachepoko]] || [[word:jachachepoko|jachachepoko]] || [[word:shachachepoko|shachachepoko]] || [[word:kachachepoko|kachachepoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
